summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Adrian Lee's portfolio website. All core features are working perfectly including hero section with typing effect, navigation, 6 project cards with modals, filter functionality, about section with experience timeline (6 entries), skills section (5 categories), certifications section (5 certs with proper badge images), footer social links, and resume download functionality. Backend health check endpoint is also working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend health check endpoint (/api/health) returns 200 status
Homepage loads with hero section, typing effect, and terminal card
Navigation bar with all required links (Portfolio, About, Skills, Certifications, Resume)
Nav brand '> Adrian_Lee' is visible and properly styled
Portfolio section renders 6 project cards with filter tabs working correctly
Project modals open on card click showing title, summary, tech tags, and action buttons
Modal Live Demo and View Repo buttons link to correct URLs
All 6 filter tabs filter projects correctly (All=6, Cybersecurity=2, Web Dev=1, etc.)
About section has profile image, bio text, and experience timeline with 6 entries
Skills section displays 5 skill category cards with tech pills
Certifications section shows 5 certs with CSPO & ICP badge images and 3 icon placeholders
Certification cards are clickable and link to external verification URLs
Footer contains 3 social icons (email, LinkedIn, GitHub) that are functional
Resume download buttons work in both navbar and hero section
Hero section View Projects and Download Resume CTA buttons are functional
Hero social icons link to correct GitHub, LinkedIn, and email addresses
Smooth scroll navigation works when clicking nav links
All interactive elements are properly clickable without overlay issues
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (1/1 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (19/19 core features working)
